productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men's Amazon White Grey Shoe
description: The simple design of these numero uno shoes have an understated elegance. The sturdy yet comfortable design takes you through the day in style. These preppy shoes look good when teamed with jeans and polo neck tees for casual outings. To add to the style, the shoes come in carefully crafted soft fabric covers for easy storage.Upper Synthetic upper with stitch detailing for style and durability Suede patchwork near the toe box and the heel counter Fibre overlays across the sides for added style Synthetic central lacing for snug Fit Lightly padded collar Lightly padded tongue with branding Midsole EVA injected phylon midsole for lightweight feel, comfort and protection from impact Outsole Outsole made of carbon rubber for extra grip Ridged pattern around the footbed for complete grip Rubber lugs below the forefoot and the heel for added grip Pivot point on the big toe mound for flexible movement of the foot shoe careRub surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
